description: Create a content slide on technology predictions using a horizontal diverging bar chart in a full layout, showing global averages for likely vs unlikely outcomes and a right-side reference column for % likely in 2023.

header.headline: Technology
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

main.title: Global averages — Likely vs Unlikely (% Likely 2023 shown separately)
labels: Artificial intelligence will lead to many new jobs being lost in [COUNTRY]
Many more people will live their lives in virtual worlds
My personal data will be leaked on the internet
Robots will look like, think like and speak like humans
Strict rules for large technology companies will be introduced by the Government in [COUNTRY]
Smartphones will be banned from schools in [COUNTRY]
Artificial intelligence will lead to many new jobs being created in [COUNTRY]
Self-driving cars will become a usual sight on the streets of my town/city
We will find a cure for cancer
I will use social media less
We will find life on other planets
Children under 14 in [COUNTRY] will be banned from using social media

rows: Artificial intelligence will lead to many new jobs being lost in [COUNTRY]
Many more people will live their lives in virtual worlds
My personal data will be leaked on the internet
Robots will look like, think like and speak like humans
Strict rules for large technology companies will be introduced by the Government in [COUNTRY]
Smartphones will be banned from schools in [COUNTRY]
Artificial intelligence will lead to many new jobs being created in [COUNTRY]
Self-driving cars will become a usual sight on the streets of my town/city
We will find a cure for cancer
I will use social media less
We will find life on other planets
Children under 14 in [COUNTRY] will be banned from using social media

left.body: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024
